blockingPolicy.mustPass: A1-A12 must pass through npm run v5:acceptance before v5.0.0 tagging.
blockingPolicy.versionRule: Run npm run version:bump -- 5.0.0 before final publish gates; do not edit version files by hand.
blockingPolicy.runtimeRule: GitHub Release native binary assets are the primary distribution path; npm tarball checks remain legacy compatibility evidence.

acceptanceIds.title: Native binary is versioned and Node-free
Agent docs and agent JSON expose only built-in CLI workflow
Strict JSON envelopes and failure classes are stable
Dry-run and explicit-output edits avoid accidental input mutation
Path traversal and unsafe ZIP inputs fail closed
Native release asset naming and smoke gates are wired
Publish gate checklist blocks tag/release until all gates pass
